headline: Paint Giant Sherwin-Williams Sees 'Little To No Recovery' In End Markets
summary: Sherwin-Williams Company shares fell Tuesday after the company reported first-quarter results that topped Wall Street expectations but issued a cautious outlook for the year. Sherwin-Williams Quarterly Report The paint and coatings maker reported adjusted earnings of $2.35 per share, exceeding the analyst consensus estimate of $2.26. Quarterly sales rose to $5.67 billion, ahead of the Street view of $5.56 billion. Segment Performance Shows Broad Growth Net sales in the Paint Stores Group increas
